transcript.text: Alright, so the GVP description we're going to have chat GPT right up for us
This is the prompt we're going to give it
750 characters is the limit for the GVP description if chat GPT goes way over that this is this right here is
The biggest challenge it often ignores this if it goes way over then
the next prompt that you would want to give it is
rewrite
with the
750 character limit in
mind do not exceed
750 characters
So if it does write more than 750 characters, just give it the second prompt head
You don't have to worry about editing it yourself
Just give it the second prompt straight away and it'll rewrite it
Obviously, you'll want to update the number of years. They've been in business
This should also definitely match their about us page and unique selling proposition. That's a weird
Punctuation there. This is basically why would why would someone go to them instead of their competition?
Right, do they offer a better warranty?
Do they offer better customer service?
What do they offer that makes people want to go there?
If you're not sure what a good unique selling proposition is then you can actually start by saying
give me some great examples of
unique selling
propositions for
plumber
Located in Houston, Texas
So as usual if we're struggling and we can't think of something good that we want to put there
Then we can just ask chat you to help us. They're gonna give some good examples
You can take those run them by a client see what they think and then choose one that sounds good
And work that into your GBP description
This doesn't need to be amazing, but it needs to be filled out and it needs to be you know decent

They've been in business This should also definitely match their about us page and unique selling proposition. That's a weird Punctuation there. This is basically why would why would someone go to them instead of their competition? Right, do they offer a better warranty? Do they offer better customer service? What do they offer that makes people want to go there? If you're not sure what a good unique selling proposition is then you can actually start by saying give me some great examples of unique selling propositions for plumber Located in Houston, Texas So as usual if we're struggling and we can't think of something good that we want to put there Then we can just ask chat you to help us. They're gonna give some good examples You can take those run them by a client see what they think and then choose one that sounds good And work that into your GBP description This doesn't need to be amazing, but it needs to be filled out and it needs to be you know decent
summary: This lesson explains how to create a GBP description using Chat GPT within a 750-character limit. It emphasizes matching the description with the 'about us' page and unique selling proposition, suggesting examples if needed.
key_points: Use Chat GPT for GBP description
Match description with about us page
